channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch England vs Australia: Live stream ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 final for FREE
item.description: All the ways to watch the 2026 Women's T20 World Cup final as hosts England face six-time champions Australia at Lord's in London.

item.title: 'Future medicines may be designed much like software' — How scientists programmed human cells to compute like tiny processors and target cancer using RNA trans-splicing
item.description: Hebrew University researchers programmed human cells to compute biologically and respond autonomously to disease-related molecular signals internally.

item.title: Xbox is a disaster
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the bleak state of the video game industry, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Microsoft closed out Summer […]

item.title: How to watch British Grand Prix 2026 F1: Live Stream, Preview, Schedule, Starting Grid as Antonelli claims pole after sprint victory
item.description: All the ways to watch British Grand Prix 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, and potentially for free.

item.title: Meet the dental robot for tooth drilling
item.description: A new dental robot is being developed to help dentists perform tooth drilling and create crowns in fewer appointments.

item.title: J’ai testé le Samsung S92H : l’OLED antireflet qui se regarde même en plein jour
item.description: La série S92H succède à la S90F. Deux nouveautés résument tout : le filtre antireflet Glare Free, jusqu'ici cantonné aux modèles premium, et une dalle qui grimpe à 165 Hz. Pour le reste, on ne change pas une équipe qui gagne. Verdict après quelques semaines d'utilisation.

item.title: J’ai testé la GXTrust GTX 735G, une manette Bluetooth en promo à moins de 40 € qui m’a (presque) réconcilié avec le gaming mobile
item.description: J'ai eu l'opportunité de passer quelques semaines en compagnie de la manette GXT 735G de Trust pour m'essayer au jeu sur mobile. Pour moins de 40 euros avec une promo, la marque propose une expérience solide, qui n'est pas sans compromis, surtout sur Android. Voici tout ce que j'en ai pensé.

item.title: Prediction Markets Let You Bet on Whether a Wildfire Will Burn Down Your Town
item.description: Wildfire survivors call fire-prediction markets “morally reprehensible” and worry they could increase the risk of arson.

item.title: Best Wi-Fi Routers (2026): My Honest Picks After Testing 40+
item.description: Don’t suffer the buffer. These WIRED-tested home routers will deliver reliable internet across your home, whatever your needs or budget.

item.title: ‘The question is no longer how much AI can produce, but how much of that output is genuinely usable’: How we use and pay for AI is undergoing a major shift
item.description: Enterprises are shifting from capabilities and performance to prioritizing trust, accuracy, and measurable business outcomes.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch British Grand Prix 2026 for free
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream the full 2026 British Grand Prix at Silverstone for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: ‘I’ll struggle to play in handheld mode without it now’: This Switch 2 grip case has saved me from neck pain — and it might save your console from damage, too
item.description: The Genki Attack Vector offers protection for your console and comfort in handheld mode — but is it worth its asking price?

item.title: Review: TCL RM9L RGB-Mini LED (2026)
item.description: This massive 85-inch model is highly customizable but jaw-droppingly expensive.

item.title: Brésil-Norvège en 8es de finale : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne regarder le match ?
item.description: Le Brésil affronte la Norvège ce dimanche 5 juillet 2026 en 8es de finale de la Coupe du monde. Le coup d'envoi est à 22h00 (heure française), et le match est diffusé gratuitement sur M6, ainsi que sur beIN Sports 1 pour les abonnés.
